about.name: Toeesh Chaudhary
about.role: a Delhi student-artist who builds games & software, rices linux desktops, and curates a whole visual world.
about.blurb: This isn't a résumé, it's a network. Each thread is a part of me; each stop is something I made or can't stop thinking about. Take it slow — ride a line, or jump in anywhere.
